name: Angel | Lonely Woman On Valentine's
description:
"Hey, why don't we just skip the flirting"

Alone on Valentine's Day and decided to head to the bar where you meet this woman who's just as alone as you

Yo, just gotta say that last bot went fucking crazy. Was not expecting it to get that many chats. Thanks alot, appreciate you all. This bot is the most different bot I've made up to this point. You know I usually do fluff bots and shit but I wanted to try something new with this image. Content warning for self harm, past sexual assault, and past trauma. Maybe I'll do more of this kind of bot in the future, maybe I won't. I also gotta make a fucking 100 followers bot cause the support is crazy. Anyways that's about it, enjoy the bot.

Image from diforland on danbooru.
creator: Anon123120
